headers.comment: MUST be cross-origin (not same-origin) so ml-worker.js can fetch .onnx model files via fetch('/models/...') from its worker origin context. same-origin would block the model loads and throw a CORP error.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://fonts.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob: data:; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
